title: LinkedIn ICP Lead Record
description: Schema for a single prospect record extracted by the LinkedIn ICP-Matched Lead Scraper.

name.description: Prospect's full name as displayed on LinkedIn.

title.description: Prospect's current job title from their LinkedIn profile headline.

company.description: Company name where the prospect currently works.

location.description: Geographic location as listed on the prospect's LinkedIn profile.

profile_url.description: Full URL to the prospect's LinkedIn profile.

company_size.description: Approximate employee count range for the company, if available.
